title: InlineReferenceRejectedError
description: Structured error raised by per-kind doctrine validators when a shipped or project-local artifact YAML contains a forbidden inline reference field. Introduced in WP1.3.

file_path.description: Absolute path of the offending YAML file.

migration_hint.description: Fixed text pointing at the graph-edge migration pattern.
migration_hint.pattern: ^Remove .+ from YAML; add edge \{source: .+, target: .+, relation: requires\} to src/doctrine/graph.yaml$

examples.migration_hint: Remove tactic_refs from YAML; add edge {source: directive:my-directive, target: tactic:my-tactic, relation: requires} to src/doctrine/graph.yaml
